blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,191 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
